description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a fitted, utilitarian outfit with reinforced armor elements. The figure features a long-sleeved shirt and pants, both closely tailored, with a prominent armored pauldron and forearm guard on the left side, suggesting a protective or combat-ready role. The right arm is less armored, with only a glove and bracer, while the left arm is fully encased in layered armor plates. The figure has a full beard and a neatly styled undercut with a top knot. The boots are sturdy and reach mid-calf, suitable for urban or rugged environments. The overall appearance is that of a vigilant, prepared individual, possibly a guard or adventurer, blending modern and medieval influences.
description: A bearded male adult in fitted clothing with asymmetric armor, including a large shoulder pauldron and forearm guard, and sturdy boots, exuding a vigilant, prepared presence.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full facial features, chest armor, and the asymmetry of the armor, with the left side heavily protected.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the layered shoulder and arm armor, as well as the profile of the head and boots.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the armor, the strap across the back, and the hairstyle with a top knot.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the less-armored arm, the fitted clothing, and the side profile of the boots and head.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeved shirt and pants with asymmetric armor including a large shoulder pauldron, forearm guard, and sturdy boots
attribute_hairstyle: short undercut with a top knot
